author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 65441eb (on top of the April 17 sweep already documented above, which had left this issue open). 2026-06-09 refresh: cargo update on main + fuzz workspaces (regex 1.12.4, serde_json 1.0.150, libc 0.2.186, ignore 0.4.26, zerocopy 0.8.51, wasm-bindgen 0.2.123, shlex 1->2 transitive, etc). cargo outdated --root-deps-only: all direct deps current; cargo audit: clean; MSRV unchanged at 1.93. Verified: 23 test suites green, clippy -D warnings clean, fmt clean, Windows-target check passes, benches build.
